events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From the Fab Four to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm is iconic. What's your favourite Ringo beat?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incredible Brian May! Not just a Queen legend, but an astrophysicist too. What's your favourite May guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Eternal Frontman
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. His energy is unmatched. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star, or just give it a new dimension?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring anthems like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from this absolute Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic moment of peace and music, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of Peace & Music at Woodstock. An unforgettable cultural moment. What acts do you wish you'd seen there?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: The King Lives On
angles.copy: 49 years ago, the world lost a legend. Remembering Elvis Presley, whose music and charisma continue to captivate generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years since we lost Tupac Shakur. His impact on music and culture remains profound. What's your favourite track from the rap icon?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose innovative sound continues to inspire. What's your go-to Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From the timeless tracks to that legendary album cover, it's a masterpiece. What's your favourite song from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rebel Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll icon with a voice that commands attention. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation. What's your favourite tune sung by the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine', a powerful message of peace, was released on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless song with a message that resonates as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod was unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. It changed everything! What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to legendary theme tunes, what's your favourite 007 moment or Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible life and enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message live on.
